scope: src/components/, src/lib/, src/services/, src/contexts/, src/hooks/, src/app/

findings.issue: onWarning/onTimeout inline callbacks recreate every render → useIdleTimeout effect re-registers all window listeners + restarts interval
findings.fix: Wrap callbacks in useCallback([user, signOut])
findings.why: Every Supabase token refresh re-registers mousedown/keydown/touchstart/scroll on window without cleanup; thousands of duplicate listeners over a 24h session

findings.issue: onTimeout reads stale `user` from effect-registration closure, not current value
findings.fix: Use settingsRef pattern (already done for wasAuthenticated in ProtectedRoute) or memoize
findings.why: User signing in after mount never gets auto-signed-out by idle timer — silent security control failure

findings.issue: Audit-log success path reads `user` from useAuth() closure that's still null right after await signIn()
findings.fix: Drop the `if (user)` guard or read user via supabase.auth.getUser() directly
findings.why: Same shape as ConversationView revert chain; success audit-log entries silently never write

findings.issue: Identical stale `user` closure: signup success audit log silently never fires
findings.fix: Same as SignInForm
findings.why: Audit trail is incomplete for sign-up success path

findings.issue: Initial-render race: when isLoading flips false but isAuthenticated hasn't yet been set, sign-in card briefly renders
findings.fix: Hold isLoading true until both getSession() AND first onAuthStateChange have resolved, OR add stable-render guard
findings.why: Documented root cause of provider-tab click failures in Firefox CI shards on /payment-demo

findings.issue: Tests render ProtectedRoute without AuthProvider mock; `useAuth()` throws in setup
findings.fix: Mock useAuth via vi.mock or wrap in AuthProvider with controlled values
findings.why: Auth-race regressions silently uncaught; tests appear green but never exercise auth-state logic

findings.issue: AdminLayout rolls its own redirect logic without ProtectedRoute's debounce; same auth-race regression that was reverted 3 times in ProtectedRoute
findings.fix: Wrap children in <ProtectedRoute>, then admin-check after, OR mirror the wasAuthenticated debounce pattern
findings.why: Token refresh briefly nulls user → router.push('/sign-in') fires → admin user kicked out

findings.issue: value object reconstructed every render; 5 methods not useCallback-wrapped
findings.fix: useMemo wrap value, useCallback wrap signUp/signIn/refreshSession/retry/clearError
findings.why: Every retryCount/error/isLoading change cascades re-renders to all consumers (ConversationView, payment, etc.)

findings.issue: createClient() called at hook top-level → new supabase identity every render → subscription teardown/recreate loop
findings.fix: useMemo(() => createClient(), [])
findings.why: DIRECT root cause of ConversationView regression chain. Each setMessages triggers full subscription cycle restart

findings.issue: Same createClient() at hook top-level; getSession() retry loop re-runs every render
findings.fix: useMemo(() => createClient(), [])
findings.why: Repeated auth round-trips in active conversations; destabilizes currentUserId state

findings.issue: No useMemo on provider value; updateSettings/resetSettings not useCallback-wrapped
findings.fix: Wrap in useCallback + useMemo (ConsentContext does this correctly at line 245)
findings.why: Every font/contrast change → all consumers re-render with new object reference

findings.issue: Storage event listener captures settings from render scope; cross-tab sync double-applies settings
findings.fix: Read settings via ref inside handler
findings.why: Cross-tab a11y sync is unreliable

findings.issue: Mount-only sync effect reads queueCount=0 at mount (initial state) so condition never true; intended sync silently never fires
findings.fix: Remove the effect (polling at line 217 covers it) OR move logic into loadQueue callback
findings.why: Queued messages stuck for up to 30s after going back online

findings.issue: IntersectionObserver rebuilt every new message; observer.disconnect() then re-observe-all on every messages change
findings.fix: Stabilize handleIntersection by reading messages from ref
findings.why: Spurious mark-as-read calls on every incoming message; potential 'already read' server errors

findings.issue: AdminOverviewPage fires loadOverview(user.id) before AdminLayout confirms admin status
findings.fix: Guard loadOverview call on confirmed admin === true
findings.why: Non-admin users briefly render the admin dashboard and trigger admin RPCs (RLS blocks them but errors surface)

findings.issue: returnUrl pre-hydration race; user lands on /profile instead of intended /messages?conversation=xyz
findings.fix: Gate onSuccess on mounted state
findings.why: Low-frequency but real navigation correctness issue on fast networks

findings.issue: API routes in src/app/api/ won't work on GitHub Pages static export per CLAUDE.md
findings.fix: Audit each route; confirm static-export-compatible OR migrate to Supabase Edge Functions OR document as build-time only
findings.why: Silent 404s in production for any callers; webhooks especially at risk

findings.issue: dialog.showModal() then immediately acceptButtonRef.focus() — Firefox doesn't guarantee focusability until next frame
findings.fix: requestAnimationFrame(() => acceptButtonRef.current?.focus())
findings.why: Same shape as Firefox CI revert 3e67772; focus call silently no-ops

findings.issue: Hybrid imperative (dialog.showModal/close) + declarative (return null) — orphaned cancel-event listeners when showModal flips false before effect cleanup
findings.fix: Pick one: either keep dialog mounted via open attribute, OR remove early return null
findings.why: Event listener accumulation on dialog element across modal opens

findings.issue: eslint-disable masks a real missing dep on scrollToBottom; auto-scroll holds stale reference when virtual scrolling activates
findings.fix: Remove eslint-disable; either fix deps or use ref-based scrollToBottom
findings.why: New messages stop auto-scrolling when crossing 100-message virtual threshold mid-conversation

findings.issue: Placeholder-only test (it('placeholder', () => expect(true).toBe(true)))
findings.fix: Implement real axe-core assertions for default/deleted/decryptionError/editing states
findings.why: Hollow CI gate; a11y regressions can land without detection

findings.issue: Placeholder-only test for primary user-interaction component
findings.fix: Add axe audit + aria-describedby + send button accessible name tests
findings.why: Same hollow-CI risk as MessageBubble

findings.issue: withAuthProvider decorator typed as `Story: any` — masks Storybook API breaking changes
findings.fix: Import { Decorator } from '@storybook/nextjs-vite' (PaymentConsentModal.stories.tsx already does this)
findings.why: CLAUDE.md code quality violation; type holes

findings.issue: console.log in send-message hot path logs JWT prefix (tokenPrefix: session?.access_token?.slice(0, 20))
findings.fix: Log opaque hasToken: !!session?.access_token only
findings.why: Token fragments visible to DevTools, browser extensions, log shippers

findings.issue: getSession() retry loop copy-pasted 6 times; each derives its own supabase client
findings.fix: Extract getAuthenticatedUser() helper (mirror payment-service.ts getAuthenticatedUserId pattern)
findings.why: Multiple client instances per method call; realtime subscription conflicts; direct contributor to post-remake instability

findings.issue: Two retry counters (conflictRetries + networkAttempt) interact incorrectly; loop can exhaust without throwing on interleaved errors
findings.fix: Single retry counter or two separate loops
findings.why: Misleading 'sequence number conflict' errors when real cause is network; caused multiple reverts

findings.issue: 8 stub methods throw generic Error not GroupError/MembershipError; React unmounts component tree
findings.fix: Throw GroupError('Not implemented: <method>')
findings.why: Group UI calls these → uncaught error in render → component tree unmounts

findings.issue: sync() loop has no DB transaction; cross-tab race possible (IndexedDB shared across tabs but syncInProgress is per-instance)
findings.fix: Use Dexie transaction OR BroadcastChannel/Web Locks API
findings.why: Same payment intent can be submitted twice across tabs

findings.issue: createPKCS8() unreachable; hardcoded length byte (0x41=65) only correct for 32-byte keys
findings.fix: Delete the method
findings.why: Latent crypto bug if future contributor re-enables; security-critical file shouldn't have dead code

findings.issue: verifyPublicKey() x/y JWK comparison: undefined `y` field on stored key produces silent false return
findings.fix: Add explicit checks for both x AND y on both keys before comparison
findings.why: Users with malformed stored keys (possible from remake migration) permanently locked out of messaging

findings.issue: event_data typed as Record<string, any>; no exclusion of password/token/key/secret keys
findings.fix: Strip credential-named keys in log() method before insert
findings.why: One accidental caller passing password → plaintext credential in DB

findings.issue: Rate limiter stores attempt counts in localStorage; user clears localStorage or opens incognito to reset
findings.fix: Move real rate limiting server-side (Edge Function or Postgres trigger on auth_audit_logs); keep client-side as UX hint only
findings.why: Brute-force protection is illusory; CLAUDE.md 'Proper Solutions Over Quick Fixes' violation

findings.issue: Private ECDH key exported to JWK and written to localStorage as plaintext JSON
findings.fix: Wrap with app-level symmetric encryption (derived from PIN or session token hash) OR scope localStorage cache to test environments via build flag
findings.why: Any XSS vulnerability anywhere → all messages compromised; defeats E2E zero-knowledge guarantee

findings.issue: getPaymentHistory uses .eq('payment_intents.template_user_id', userId) on join alias — silent no-op filter
findings.fix: Use proper PostgREST embedded resource filter syntax
findings.why: Silent no-op means query relies entirely on RLS; if RLS misconfigures, becomes data leak

findings.issue: cacheMessages() does delete() then bulkAdd() without transaction; tab killed between operations leaves cache empty
findings.fix: Wrap in messagingDb.transaction('rw', ...)
findings.why: Offline-prep window: user goes offline mid-operation → sees no messages

remake_pattern_findings: Multiple instances of createClient() at hook top-level (root cause of ConversationView regression)
AdminLayout duplicates the auth-race regression that was fixed in ProtectedRoute (regression re-introduced)
Several context providers missing useMemo (ConsentContext does it right, AccessibilityContext + AuthContext don't)
Stale-closure-after-async-auth pattern repeats across SignInForm, SignUpForm, AuthContext idle callbacks
